Database.//: Provider = InMemory (mock, default) or SqlServer (real existing member DB).

ConnectionStrings.//: AuthDb holds the auth-owned schema (auth.RefreshTokens). Required when Database:Provider = SqlServer.

LobConnections.//: One connection string per LOB. Used by the Dapper repository to pick the member DB at login. Supply from Key Vault/secrets in production.

Jwt.//PrivateKeyPem: In production, inject a PKCS#8 RSA private key via secrets/Key Vault.

PasswordHashing.//: Match these to the EXACT scheme used by the existing database when you switch to SqlServer.
